message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant Client as "Client"
    participant API as "API"
    participant MsgServer as "MsgServer"

    Note over Client, API, MsgServer: Please use '!option handwritten true' to enable handwritten

    Note over Client, API, MsgServer: 系统用户登录时序图

    Client ->> API: 1 login
    API ->> Client: 2 account verify

    alt [verify success:]
        API -->> MsgServer: 3 generate jwt and return
        MsgServer -->> Client: 4 connect MsgServer and build tcp connect
        MsgServer -->> API: 5 parse jwt and attr the accountInfo to Channel
        API -->> MsgServer: 6 connect success
        MsgServer -->> Client: 7 login failed;
    end

    alt [verify fail:]
        API -->> Client: 7 login failed;
    end

    %% Add handwritten option note
    Note over Client, API, MsgServer: !option handwritten true
@enduml
